title: Expand host event set + plugin unload/reload (Hachimi-Edge-6yd)

description: ABI: add event constants + payload structs (no version bump)
notes: Added event constants VIEW_CHANGE/CAREER_START/CAREER_END/TRAINING_COMMAND/SPLASH_SHOWN + ViewChangeEvent/TrainingCommandEvent #[repr(C)] payloads + UNLOADABLE capability bit. No API_VERSION bump (additive); abi_layout tests stay 9/42 and pass.

description: events.rs: dispatch helpers for new events

notes: SceneManager::ChangeViewCommon now dispatches VIEW_CHANGE every view change and SPLASH_SHOWN once (swap-guarded).
New host module SingleModeMainViewController hooks SendCommandAsync(6) and emits TRAINING_COMMAND(command_id). Registered in umamusume/mod.rs.

description: Career watcher: poll IsPlaying from FRAME -> CAREER_START/EN
notes: career.rs polls WorkDataManager->get_SingleMode->get_IsPlaying from FRAME (throttled 30 frames, lazy-resolved/cached, guarded) and emits CAREER_START/END on transitions.

description: Migrate training-tracker onto new events; drop redundant hoo
notes: training-tracker hooks.rs rewritten as event subscriptions (TRAINING_COMMAND + CAREER_START/END), dropping its own SendCommandAsync IL2CPP hook + diagnostic dumps. lib.rs updated. Plugin builds clean.

description: Unload/reload: owner-scoped handles, HMODULE, guarded unload
notes: Owner-scoped registrations/subscriptions (OwnerScope guard, current_owner tagging) + remove_by_owner + shutdown_and_remove_owner. Plugin gains id/module_handle/unloadable. unload_plugin (teardown always; FreeLibrary only if UNLOADABLE) + reload_plugin (requires UNLOADABLE) in windows/main.rs, plus cross-platform reload_all wired to a Danger Zone GUI button. Unit tests for owner reclaim added; all pass.

description: Docs update + full verification gate + close issue
notes: Rewrote the Plugin model (v9) events section of docs/architecture.md (full event table, payloads, ownership, unload/reload + safety caveat). Fixed parallel-test interference via a shared core::plugin::TEST_LOCK. Final gate: cargo build/clippy(-D warnings)/test(workspace)/fmt all clean and non-flaky over 3 runs.
